nasb.text: Then all the Jews returned from all the places to which they had been driven away and came to the land of Judah, to Gedaliah at Mizpah, and gathered in wine and summer fruit in great abundance.

esv.text: then all the Judeans returned from all the places to which they had been driven and came to the land of Judah, to Gedaliah at Mizpah. And they gathered wine and summer fruits in great abundance.

cnv.text: 所有的猶大人就從被趕逐到的各地方回來，到猶大地的米斯巴去見基大利，並且收存了許多的酒和夏天的果子。

ccb.text: 便从各地回到犹大，去米斯巴见基大利。他们储备了大量的酒和夏天的果子。
